name: spatula
intro: An apothecary spatula is a specialized tool used by apothecaries to measure and handle powdery or viscous substances in their work. This tool typically features a long handle and a flat, rounded or angled blade, allowing for precise control and gentle scraping of the material. Apothecaries use the spatula to scoop, mix, and apply ingredients in the preparation of remedies, tonics, and other medicinal concoctions. Its precision and versatility make it an essential item in the apothecary's arsenal. By using a spatula, apothecaries can ensure accurate measurements and minimize waste.
